S.FORM: Mohammed VI of Morocco I 1963 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mohammed VI of Morocco, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Morocco anini i ci Mohammed VI of Morocco, patirengan a romi'ad i 1999 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 23 a romi'ad. Itiyaay ho a 'orip śó©śúüÁĒüśīĽ Hongti no Morocco śĎ©śīõŚď•ÁöĄŚúčÁéč misafangcal ato mipakonira to 'orip Á§ĺśúÉśĒĻťĚ©ŚŹäŤá™ÁĒĪŚĆĖ
S.PHON: mo~uńßamm…ô…¨~…ģ b~vi o~uf mo~uro~u ¶ ¶o~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i mo~uńßamm…ô…¨~…ģ b~vi o~uf mo~uro~u ¶ ¶o~u, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u mo~uro~u ¶ ¶o~u anini i ¶i mo~uńßamm…ô…¨~…ģ b~vi o~uf mo~uro~u ¶ ¶o~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. itijaaj ńßo~u a °o~urip **** ńßo~uŇčti no~u mo~uro~u ¶ ¶o~u ****** misafaŇč ¶a…ĺ ato~u mipako~unira to~u °o~urip ********
S.FORM: Mohammed VI of Morocco I 1963 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Mohammed VI of Morocco, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Morocco anini i ci Mohammed VI of Morocco, patirengan a romi'ad i 1999 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 23 a romi'ad.
